examples: I tried to approach him, but he turned away.

definitions.text: Aside, so as to discard something.
examples: throw away, chuck away, toss away

definitions.text: Away with you! Go away! Begone!
Not here, gone, absent, unavailable, traveling; on vacation.
examples: The master is away from home.
Would you pick up my mail while I'm away.

definitions.text: At a specified distance in space, time, or figuratively.
examples: Spring is still a month away.
This is the entrance for away supporters.
Next, they are playing away in Dallas.

definitions.text: To depart; to go to another place.
examples: At 9 o'clock sharp he awayed to bed.
